content:
# Solid-Phase Extraction

**Summary**: A sample preparation method used to separate and purify specific compounds from a complex mixture.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-akere|Akere, 2015]] used solid phase extraction for the biota samples to extract organotins.

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] used solid phase extraction to fractionate bitumen into saturates, aromatics, and NSO compounds.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] used solid phase extraction to fractionate bitumen into saturates, aromatics, and NSO compounds.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- 5g dry weight of the samples were minced, digested with 20 ml of deionized water by acetonitrile... extracted with 30 ml of n-hexane. ([[2015-akere|Akere, 2015, p. 28]])

- Fractionation showed that the oil present had fewer non-hydrocarbon compounds and more hydrocarbon compounds. ([[2020-usman|Usman, 2020, p. 60]])
